name: mcp-sap-docs

scripts.build:fts-only: npm run build:tsc && node dist/scripts/build-index.js && node dist/scripts/build-fts.js
scripts.build: npm run build:tsc && node dist/scripts/build-index.js && node dist/scripts/build-fts.js && node dist/scripts/build-embeddings.js
scripts.test: npm run test:url-generation && npm run test:discovery-center && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:sparse-checkout: npm run build:tsc && npx vitest run test/sparse-checkout.test.ts
scripts.test:url-generation: npm run build:tsc && npx vitest run test/comprehensive-url-generation.test.ts test/source-url-matrix.test.ts test/source-url-preference.test.ts test/openux-materializer.test.ts test/search-response-schema.test.ts test/prompts.test.ts test/software-heroes-afm.test.ts test/ui5-version-diff.test.ts test/sap-help-id.test.ts
scripts.test:url-generation:debug: npm run build:tsc && DEBUG_TESTS=true npx vitest run test/comprehensive-url-generation.test.ts
scripts.test:mcp-urls: npm run build:tsc && npx vitest run test/mcp-search-url-verification.test.ts
scripts.test:integration:urls: npm run build && node test/tools/run-tests.js --spec search-url-verification.js
scripts.test:urls:status: npm run build:tsc && npx tsx test/url-status.ts
scripts.setup:submodules: git submodule sync --recursive && git submodule update --init --recursive --depth 1 && git submodule status --recursive
scripts.test:software-heroes: npm run build:tsc && npx vitest run test/software-heroes-core.test.ts test/software-heroes-afm.test.ts test/software-heroes-content-search.test.ts
scripts.test:discovery-center: npm run build:tsc && npx vitest run test/discovery-center.test.ts
scripts.test:fetch-sap-help: npm run build:tsc && npx vitest run test/fetch-sap-help.test.ts
scripts.test:sap-objects: npm run build:tsc && npx vitest run test/sap-released-objects.test.ts
scripts.test:embeddings: npm run build:tsc && npx vitest run test/embeddings.test.ts
scripts.test:ui5-version-diff: npm run build:tsc && npx vitest run test/ui5-version-diff.test.ts
scripts.test:version-filter: npm run build:tsc && npx vitest run test/version-filter-sap-help.test.ts
scripts.test:product-filter: npm run build:tsc && npx vitest run test/product-filter-sap-help.test.ts
scripts.test:fallback-ladder: npm run build:tsc && npx vitest run test/help-fallback-ladder.test.ts
scripts.test:citations: npm run build:tsc && npx vitest run test/citations-sap-help.test.ts
scripts.test:html-to-md: npm run build:tsc && npx vitest run test/html-to-md.test.ts

description: Offline SAP documentation MCP server with unified local + online search
